The Credit Challenge in Restructuring

How we support the restructuring lifecycle

From the moment a restructuring mandate is won to long after completion, Lightbulb provides credit intelligence that helps your clients — and your team — navigate every stage with confidence.

1
Mandate Stage
Differentiate at the point of winning work

Providing market-leading credit data and analysis gives the Opus Business Advisory restructuring team a genuine edge at mandate stage — a compelling differentiator that demonstrates depth of insight from day one.

2
Restructuring Planning
Understand how structure affects credit — before it's too late

Different restructuring approaches trigger very different responses from credit insurers and rating agencies. We provide the insight needed to anticipate those reactions and plan restructurings with confidence.

3
Risk Identification & Mitigation
A holistic credit view across every risk dimension

Risk identification and mitigation is central to the restructuring team's work. Lightbulb supports that process by delivering a complete picture of credit risk — across agencies, insurers and market factors — so nothing is missed.

4
Completion & Post-Restructuring Support
Certainty and defined outcomes at the critical moment

At completion, certainty matters most. Lightbulb's deep market knowledge and consultative approach helps your teams and their clients reach defined, confident outcomes — removing credit uncertainty at the most critical moment.

5
Ongoing Advisory Support
The deal is done — but the relationship doesn't have to be

Truly valuable relationships continue long after restructuring completes. Our ongoing monitoring and advisory services provide post-restructuring comfort for your clients — and a lasting reason for them to stay connected to your team.

Insight & Advice

How we can be an extension
of your team

Restructuring Support

The work we do supports restructuring professionals and their clients — giving advisors, creditors and management teams a deeper and broader credit insight to manage risk effectively.

Market Intelligence

Real time credit insight enables your team to be aware of and navigate market conditions effectively — giving a clear picture of the risks and opportunities to maximise value through a restructuring.

Client Relationships

Engaging with clients and understanding their credit position is at the heart of everything we do. We support your restructuring teams by delivering real time, high value insight to build better relationships and unlock more value for your clients.

Our Track Record

We have a proven record of unlocking value.

Our core services

Built for the complexity
of Restructuring & Insolvency

Three integrated services that work together to support your clients across the full restructuring lifecycle — from early-stage credit assessment through to post-restructuring monitoring.

01
Credit Rating Consultancy

We engage directly with all major credit reference agencies on behalf of your clients — explaining restructuring events, providing evidence, and presenting context to improve scores and recommended limits.

02
Credit Monitoring Platform

A live dashboard giving you and your clients complete visibility of ratings and limits across all major agencies. Real-time email alerts, monthly summary reports and direct access to our expert team.

Live portal
Email alerts
Monthly reports
Expert support
03
Trade Credit Insurance Support

We work with insurers on behalf of your clients to restore and improve the limits their suppliers can obtain. This gives your clients and their advisors confidence that supply chains and commercial relationships remain protected throughout the restructuring process.

Full market
Ongoing engagement
Client results

Proven outcomes across the restructuring lifecycle

From early-stage credit assessment to post-restructuring monitoring — real results for restructuring professionals

Pre-acquisition · Working capital
Making the investment thesis work in 2 weeks
The situation
A PE fund needed quick credit insight into a target to establish the working capital landscape. Managing key suppliers was identified as critical to making the investment thesis viable.
What we did
Delivered a rating and recommended credit limit improvement programme within 2 weeks, before the transaction closed.
£500k
of working capital improvements delivered — making the deal viable for the fund
Pre-sale · Exit optimisation
£2.2m value uplift for £38m manufacturer at exit
The situation
A £38m turnover manufacturer had moderate to suboptimal ratings, working capital under pressure and a negative balance sheet — threatening the cash-out value at exit.
What we did
Prepared detailed information to explain the company and group structure to all credit rating agencies and secured improved limits ahead of sale.
£2.2m
improvement in cash-out value at exit
Post-transaction · Carve-out
£0 to £250k credit limits for a carved-out NewCo
The situation
A division carved out to operate as a standalone company under a new holding structure. Strong track record, credible backers — but to agencies it was a new entity with no independent history. Recommended credit: £0.
What we did
Presented the strength of the new ownership structure, the credibility of the backers and the substance behind the entity to all agencies simultaneously.
£250k
maximum credit limits achieved across all agencies — from zero
Life-cycle · Healthcare · PIK loan notes
Healthcare business unlocks tender eligibility in 5 days
The situation
A PE-backed healthcare business filed accounts showing a PIK loan note structure. Agencies suppressed credit scores to £0 — risking unfavourable supplier terms and disqualification from long-term contract tenders.
What we did
Worked with management and the PE investor to present trading information and context on the loan notes, giving agencies the full picture. Limits recovered to between £120k and £300k across the agencies.
5 days
to restore credit standing and regain long-term contract tender eligibility
Life-cycle · Working capital squeeze
£1.8m cash flow improvement for £30m PE-backed business
The situation
A £30m PE-backed business showed a statutory accounting loss despite £2.1m EBITDA. All rating agencies and insurers reduced or removed cover — causing a real cash squeeze and significant supply chain disruption.
What we did
Liaised with credit rating agencies and key trade credit insurers to present a clearer picture of trading. Post-improvement work ensured 80% of the supply chain returned to 30-day payment terms.
£1.8m
cash flow yielded from restoring 30-day supplier terms within one week
Restructuring · £260m food business
£17m working capital impact mitigated for PE-backed food business
The situation
A £260m PE-backed food box business faced a strategy change resulting in large losses and impairments. Management was concerned a filing would cause catastrophic credit impacts across the supply chain.
What we did
Quantified the £17m supply chain risk. Identified required actions and prepared management information for agencies in the exact format needed to maintain limits.
£17m
working capital impact avoided — maintained recommended limits across all agencies
Credit monitoring platform

Know before it matters

A single live view of every major rating agency and two of the leading trade credit insurers — so nothing across your restructuring portfolio changes without you knowing.

A single view of the whole market

Most businesses only see one agency's view. Our platform monitors all major agencies simultaneously — Experian, Equifax, D&B, Creditsafe, Coface and Allianz — updated in real time.

Real-time alerts, monthly updates & expert support

Instant notifications the moment a rating changes, monthly reports tracking progress over time, and direct access to the Lightbulb team for guidance — all in one place.

Know how insurers rate your portfolio companies

Trade credit insurers quietly influence the terms suppliers offer. Data from the leading insurers is included so you're never the last to know when an insurer's view shifts.

Deployed as a portfolio-wide risk tool

Your team will gain the insight to have more proactive, better-informed conversations with clients. Use credit data as a powerful tool across your whole restructuring caseload.

Credit insight report

A complete picture.
Zero credit footprint.

A 4-page summary giving advisors and their clients a complete view of how a business is rated across every major agency and insurer — with no negative impact on the company whatsoever.

1
Current ratings & recommended credit limits across all agencies
2
12-month maximum & minimum ratings and limits
3
Volume of credit searches run by suppliers per agency
4
Payment adherence & Days Beyond Agreed Terms (DBAT)
5
CCJs on the company's credit file
6
Coface & Allianz insurer scores and cover levels
7
Filing dates and other key leading indicators

We use the insight to help clients understand their current position and work with them and their advisors to improve ratings and unlock higher limits.
